items.name: Bhuja Chatpatey
items.description: Puffed rice mixed with boiled potatoes, fresh onion, tomatoes, corraiander and chef's secret speices.

items.name: Samosa Chat
items.description: Samosa topped with chickpeas, chopped onions, snacks, younghurt & special sweet sauces.

items.name: Chwassi Aalu Bowl Chatpat
items.description: Puffed rice mixed with boiled potato, fresh tomato, spanish, onion, fresh chilly, secret spices and tossed on fresh lemon juice and roasted mustard oil packed in deep fried potato shell.

items.name: Papdi Chat
items.description: Papdi topped with chickpeas, chopped onions, snack, younghurt & special sweet sauces.

items.name: Chauchau Chatpatey
items.description: Nepalese Style Noodle mixed with boiled potatoes, fresh onion, tomatoes, corriander and chef's secret spices.

items.name: Paneer Pakoda
items.description: Mashed cottage cheese mixed with thin sliced onions, coriander, green chillies, lettuce, chickpea flour and chef's special spices and later deep fried.

items.name: Veggie Soya Chilli
items.description: Fried soya chunks sauteed with capsicum, onions, tomatoes, garlic, & corriander mixed with sweet, spicy, tangy and soy sauce.

items.name: Samosa (per piece)
items.description: Fried or baked pastry with a savoury filing, including ingridents such as spiced potatoes, onions and peas.

items.name: Paneer Chilli
items.description: Fried cottage cheese sauteed with capsicum, onions, tomatoes, garlic, & corriander mixed with sweet, spicy, tangy and soy sauce.

items.name: Taareko aalu (Battered potato)
items.description: Potato slices battered and deep fried, tossed with spices, served with zesty chutney.

items.name: Cheese Chilli Chips
items.description: Potato chips sauteed with capsicum, onions, tomatoes, garlic, & corriander mixed with sweet, spicy, tangy and soy sauce.

items.name: Manangey Piro Timmur Aaloo
items.description: Boiled potato marinated in sichuan pepper, other spices and slowly pan fried.

items.name: Pani Puri
items.description: Fried puff crispy dough-balls filled with sour, tangy and spicy potatoes and spicy water shot on the side.

items.name: Bhatmas Sadheko/Peanut Sadheko
items.description: Tangy peanut or fried Soyabean tossed with spices, veges and herbs.

items.name: Aalu Chop (Potato Fritters)
items.description: Spiced mashed potatoes coated with corn flour paste & deep fried.

items.name: Pyaji/ Pyaj Pakoda
items.description: This sliced onions mixed with coriander, green chillies, lettuce, chickpea flour and chef's special spices and later deep fried.

items.name: Nepalese Style Chicken Sausage (Per Stick)
items.description: Fried Chicken Sausage, served per piece.

items.name: Chicken Chatpatey
items.description: Samosa topped with chickpeas, chopped onions, snacks, younghurt & special sweet sauces.

items.name: Chicken Choila
items.description: Grilled meat of your choice mixed with fresh herbs, onions, green chillies, corriander and chef's special spices.

items.name: Haas (Duck) ko Choila
items.description: Grilled meat of your choice mixed with fresh herbs, onions, green chillies, corriander and chef's special spices.

items.name: Chicken Chilli
items.description: Fried chicken sauteed with capsicum, onions, tomatoes.

items.name: Buff Sukuti
items.description: Dried buff jerky tossed with spices, onions and herbs.

items.name: Narayan Dai Ko Jastai Sandar Momo
items.description: Local cold soup momo that brings an emotional journey back to Nepal.

items.name: BMW Momo
items.description: Delight in our signature momos, served in an adorable steamer pot right at your table. Accompanied by a savory goat rib soup and a succulent goat cutlet.

items.name: Matka Momo
items.description: Juicy dumplings served in a clay pot, infused with rich, aromatic spices, offering an authentic Nepali experience.

items.name: Pressure Cooker Momo
items.description: Chicken momos served with rich and flavorful goat bone marrow soup, creating a unique and indulgent culinary experience.

items.name: Bamboo Jhol Momo
items.description: Momo steamed in bamboo, where the natural sourness of bamboo enhances the flavour and aroma, served fresh from the bamboo with chicken or veg mince soup.

items.name: Kotheys of Nepal
items.description: Pan fried typical Nepalese open momo served with chutney.

items.name: Steamed
items.description: Classic soft dumplings.

items.name: Deep Fried
items.description: Crispy golden deep fried dumplings.

items.name: Kothey
items.description: Pan Fried.

items.name: Sadheko Momo
items.description: Dry spicy salad style.

items.name: Chilli Momo
items.description: Spicy tossed dumplings.

items.name: Jhol Momo
items.description: Tomato soup (contains nuts).

items.name: Momo Platter
items.description: A signature platter of 25 handcrafted dumplings, perfectly curated in four unique flavours. Ideal for sharing and experiencing the best of momo in one plate.

items.name: Newari Khaja Set
items.description: A traditional thoj celebrating Newari culture, served with beaten rice, bara, egg, dry anchovies, sadheko bhatmas, spinach saag, aalu achar, spiced potatoes, and your choice of meat.

items.name: Tass Khaja Set
items.description: Chitwan ko Gajjab Taas Set. Tender goat meat slow pan fried in traditional spices, served dry, bold, and full of flavour accompanied by puffed rice, radish chutney and fresh salad.

items.name: Chowmein
items.description: Nepalese style stir fried noodles.

items.name: Dharaney Thukpa
items.description: Boiled Stick Noodles served with authentic soup of your choice.

items.name: Khukhuri Special Momo Thukpa
items.description: Boiled Stick Noodles served with authentic soup of your choice and side of Nepalese dumplings (4 pieces of dumplings).

items.name: Jwai Thakali Set
items.description: A traditional feast served with steamed rice, accompanied by 18 varieties of authentic Thakali sides and chutneys.

items.name: Jimbu Thakali Khana Set
items.description: Traditional Thakali khana set served with steamed rice and authentic Thakali sides.

items.name: Gorkhali Chicken Curry
items.description: Bone-on chicken curry.

items.name: Paltan Style Goat Curry
items.description: Bone-on goat curry.

items.name: Paneer Tikka Masala
items.description: Grilled cubes of cottage cheese marinated in yogurt and spices, then simmered in a creamy, velvety tomato-based sauce. It contains Dairy and is G.F., N.F.

items.name: Matar Paneer
items.description: A popular North Indian vegetarian classic featuring soft cubes of cottage cheese and sweet green peas simmered in a wild, spiced tomato and onion gravy. Contains Dairy and is N.F., G.F.

items.name: Butter Paneer
items.description: Cubes of cottage cheese cooked in the same decadent, creamy tomato and butter sauce as the classic butter chicken. It contains Dairy and is G.F., N.F.

items.name: Palak Paneer
items.description: Fresh spinach puree cooked with cubes of cottage cheese, lightly spiced and finished with a touch of cream. It contains Dairy, G.F., N.F.

items.name: Cauli Aloo Tarkari
items.description: A classical vegetarian dry curry featuring fresh cauliflower florets and diced potatoes sauteed with turmeric, cumin, and coriander. It contains Dairy and is G.F., N.F.

items.name: Jimbu Jhaneko Daal Tadka
items.description: Black Himalayan lentils tempered with aromatic Himalayan herbs (Jimbu), garlic, and cumin for a smoky, earthy finish. It contains Dairy and is G.F., N.F.

items.name: Mixed veg Curry
items.description: A seasonal selection of fresh vegetables sauteed with onions, tomatoes, and a balanced blend of traditional spices. It contains Dairy and is G.F., N.F.

items.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
items.description: Tender pieces of boneless roasted chicken breast cooked in a rich, creamy tomato and onion sauce with mild spices. It contains Dairy and is G.F., N.F.

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: Juicy pieces of chicken simmered in a mild, buttery, and creamy tomato sauce - a world famous favorite. It contains dairy and is G.F., N.F.

items.name: Lamb Vindaloo
items.description: A fiery and tangy curry featuring tender lamb and potatoes cooked in a bold sauce of red chilies, vinegar and a garlic. It contains Dairy and is G.F., N.F.

items.name: Lamb Rogan Josh
items.description: A classic Kashmiri-style lamb curry flavored with alkanet root (ratanjot) and dried ginger in a deep, fragrant red gravy. It contains dairy and is G.F., N.F.

items.name: Lamb Korma
items.description: Succulent lamb braised in a mild, silk-textured sauce made with cream, yogurt, and aromatic spices. It contains Dairy and is G.F., N.F.

items.name: Sunset Mocktail
items.description: A harmoniuos blend of fresh mint, zesty orange, tangy lemon, and the sweet glow of watermelon juice, all sparkling with Sprite. It's a taste of sunshine that paints your evening with joy.

items.name: Safe Sex On Beach
items.description: A vibrant blend of orange, cranberry, and pineapple juices, with a touch of grenadine for that alluring twist. It's a playful, non-alcholoic escape to paradise.

items.name: Cindrella
items.description: A magical mix of pineapple and orange juices, a touch of grenadine, and a sparkling finale of soda water.

items.name: Virgin Colada
items.description: Delight in the tropical paradise where pineapple juice, creamy coconut, and a scoop of vanilla ice-cream come together for a refreshing taste of vacation in every sip. No passport needed!

items.name: Rose and Lychee Fizz
items.description: A classic blend of fragrant rose and sweet lychee, complemented by a refreshing hint of lemon that is set to balance floral and fruity notes with a zesty fonosh.

items.name: Virgin Mojito
items.description: A virgin mojito is a refreshing, non-alcoholic mocktail combining fresh lime juice, mint leaves, sugar, and sparkling water. Flavours (choose 1): Virgin, Cranberry, Pomegranate.
